## PR14: Review Gate and Workspace UI Realtime State Synchronization Substrate

### Scope

Adds reusable frontend synchronization primitives for evaluation workspace state without wiring them into active routes yet.

### Why

Review Gate / workspace UI needs to reflect backend job state changes deterministically so users cannot interact with stale or actively-mutating workspace data while background runners hold active leases.

### In scope

- Add `useEvaluationSubscription(...)` client hook.
- Listen to Supabase realtime updates for the target `evaluation_jobs` row.
- Map `phase`, `phase_status`, `cancellation_requested`, and `lease_until` into a stable local state shape.
- Add injectable realtime client support for testability.
- Add `WorkspaceSyncProvider` UI guard.
- Add mapping tests for valid rows, malformed payload fallback, and cancellation lock signaling.

### Out of scope

- No route/layout adoption.
- No direct database writes from React.
- No Review Gate submit behavior.
- No artifact persistence wiring.
- No styling overhaul.

### Files changed

- `hooks/useEvaluationSubscription.ts`
- `components/evaluation/WorkspaceSyncProvider.tsx`
- `__tests__/components/workspaceUiSubscription.test.ts`

### Reviewer note

This is substrate only. It intentionally does not wrap any existing workspace route yet; adoption should happen after the synchronization behavior is reviewed independently.
